name: Easy Shrimp Etouffee
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Parsley, chopped, or 1 1/2 teaspoons dried parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large skillet over low heat.
2. Add Ro-Tel and sauté for about two hours until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
3. Stir in Bell pepper, celery, onions, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, Cream of Mushroom Soup, and lemon juice.
4. Reduce heat to low and add shrimp. Cook for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until shrimp are cooked through.
5. Serve over hot rice, garnished with green onion tops if desired.
This makes a generous 4 servings.
